info.name: Check Point MCP Agent (Azure Foundry)
info.description: Invoke the Check Point security-ops hosted agent. Two ways: (1) the bridge -- a static bearer token any client can send (Teams, n8n, curl, Postman); (2) the Entra-native Responses endpoint for Azure-aware clients. Set the collection variables before running. No secrets are stored in this file -- fill bridgeToken / entraToken yourself (fetch the bridge token from Key Vault: az keyvault secret show --vault-name <kv> --name <prefix>-bridge-token --query value -o tsv).

variable.description: Output of: python3 -m chkpmcpaz bridge show
The static bearer token from Key Vault secret <prefix>-bridge-token. NEVER commit a real value.
The hosted agent's Responses endpoint (Azure-aware clients only).
An Entra token on the ai.azure.com scope: az account get-access-token --scope https://ai.azure.com/.default --query accessToken -o tsv. NEVER commit a real value.

request.description: Static-token front door. Any client can call this with only the bearer token; no Azure login required.
Azure-aware path: an Entra bearer token (ai.azure.com scope) straight at the hosted agent's Responses endpoint. No bridge needed.
